item.title: Jamie Dimon says AI is already reshaping JPMorgan Chase's workforce as bank plans 'huge redeployment’
item.description: JPMorgan, the world's biggest bank by market cap, has the industry's largest annual tech budget at nearly $20 billion, and it has outlined an ambitiou...

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: IBM, AMD, Dillard's, Novo Nordisk, Keysight Technologies & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: AMD, Home Depot, Hims & Hers Health, Diamondback Energy and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: Fed's Goolsbee calls for a hold on cuts as current rate of inflation is 'not good enough'
item.description: The Chicago Fed president said Tuesday that cuts aren't appropriate until there's more evidence that inflation is on its way down.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: KKR, Blackstone, CrowdStrike, International Paper & more
item.description: These are some of the stocks posting the largest midday moves.
